Items.Title: USA march on but will Balogun red card prove costly?
Items.Description: Mauricio Pochettino's USA side set up a World Cup last-16 meeting with Belgium, but how costly will forward Folarin Balogun's red card prove?

Items.Title: Latest ever winner, comeback and controversy - Senegal's remarkable exit
Items.Description: Late drama, controversy, history and heartbreak - the World Cup last-32 tie between Belgium and Senegal had everything.

Items.Title: Senegal fury as Belgium complete World Cup comeback with VAR drama
Items.Description: Belgium beat Senegal 3-2 in extra time to reach the World Cup last 16, but the match was overshadowed by a VAR decision in the closing minutes
Items.Author: Mark Wakefield

CompetitionRules.Title: When two (or more) teams are tied on Points, the following rules break the tie:
